_info: Template de proyecto — The Scientist Complexity Framework
level_name: <Standalone Script | Static App | Basic Backend | Distributed System | Complex Platform>

_level_guide.1: Scripts, notebooks, ETLs simples — sin deploy, ejecución manual o programada
_level_guide.2: Webs sin backend, dashboards estáticos — hosting simple (Vercel, Netlify)
_level_guide.3: APIs, CRUD apps, base de datos, autenticación simple
_level_guide.4: Backend + frontend separados, microservicios, colas, workers, integraciones externas
_level_guide.5: Multi-tenant, escalabilidad real, observabilidad, CI/CD sólido, Docker/Kubernetes

flags: <ai-ml | multiplatform | advanced-security | realtime | data-intensive | cloud-native | payments | high-concurrency>

_flags_guide.ai-ml: Usa modelos, inferencia o pipelines de ML/IA

data.3: Data pipelines complejos, volumen alto o múltiples fuentes
